empty_path_error: parse failed: sweep_path_entity_ids must not be empty
non_positive_scale_error: parse failed: sweep_scale_end must be finite and > 0 when provided
unknown_path_entity_error: parse failed: sweep path references unknown sketch entity entity.path.missing
unsolved_constraint_error: evaluation failed: sketch profile profile.sweep.unsolved has unsolved constraints; conversion blocked
parity_contracts: closed sketch profiles map deterministically into sketch.sweep.v1 feature nodes with path/twist/scale controls
open sweep profiles emit deterministic CAD-WARN-NON-MANIFOLD warnings
empty-path, invalid-scale, unknown-path, and unsolved-constraint sweep inputs fail deterministically
